title: DEX Trade History
body: Pull all DEX swap events and volume for any wallet address or token pair.

title: Live DEX Pair Stream
body: Subscribe to new DEX pair creations as they happen across chains — catch launches the moment liquidity is added.

title: Token Launch Screener
body: Real-time screener for new DEX token launches — filter by minimum liquidity, chain, and pair token. Build a Dexscreener-style new pairs feed.

title: DeFi Wallet Dashboard
body: Complete DeFi overview for any wallet — current token positions with USD values, 30-day portfolio performance curve, and recent swap activity in one dashboard.

title: Base Memecoin Screener
body: Live feed of new token launches on Base — subscribes to new Aerodrome/Uniswap pairs, shows real-time price candles and momentum for meme coin hunters.
